# CoopAI

> Deep code intelligence for VS Code — organizational context from your code graph, Slack, Jira, and docs.

CoopAI helps engineering teams understand existing codebases, trace decisions, find owners, and write graph-grounded completions without cloning entire monorepos.

## Product

- Homepage: https://coop-ai.dev
- Product: https://coop-ai.dev/product
- Enterprise: https://coop-ai.dev/enterprise
- Integrations: https://coop-ai.dev/integrations
- Pricing: https://coop-ai.dev/pricing
- Security: https://coop-ai.dev/security
- Book a demo: https://coop-ai.dev/demo

## Documentation

- Docs hub: https://coop-ai.dev/docs
- Getting started: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/getting-started
- Connect integrations: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/connect-integrations
- Security architecture: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/security-architecture
- Enterprise deployment: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/enterprise-deployment
- API reference: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/api-reference
- FAQ: https://coop-ai.dev/docs/faq
- Owner's Manual: https://coop-ai.dev/manual

## Key capabilities

- Understand Repo — architecture, ownership, and key files
- Trace Decision — rationale from commits, PRs, Slack, and tickets
- Find Owner — CODEOWNERS, blame history, and escalation paths
- Blast Radius — impact analysis before you ship
- Knowledge Gaps — missing docs and blind spots
- Inline complete and edit selection — graph-grounded craftsmanship in VS Code

## Enterprise

- Zero-clone indexing architecture
- Zero-retention LLM routing with BYOK
- Self-hosted and cloud deployment options
- Audit logging and compliance documentation

## Contact

- General: hello@coop-ai.dev
- Security: security@coop-ai.dev
- Privacy: privacy@coop-ai.dev
